name: Vanilla Slice-And-Bake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat well at medium speed with an electric mixer.
3. Add egg and vanilla extract; beat again until combined.
4. Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Stir in chopped pecans.
6. Form the dough into two 12-inch rolls.
7. Wrap each roll tightly in wax paper and chill for at least 2 hours.
8. Unwrap the rolls and cut into slices about 1/4 inch thick.
9. Place the slices on ungreased cookie sheets.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes.
11. Allow the cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheets before transferring them to wire racks to cool completely.
Yield: Approximately 7 dozen cookies.
